channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Edo Governor Suspends Officials Over Official Infraction
item.description: Edo State Governor, Senator Monday Okpebholo, has approved the suspension of the Commissioner for Livestock Development, Prof. Omorodion Ignatius Ikponmwosa, and the State Project Coordinator of the L...

item.title: MEA condemns Russian missile attack on vessel killing 4 Indians
item.description: The Indian Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) has strongly condemned a Russian missile attack on a Guinea Bissau-flagged merchant vessel off Ukraine's coast, which killed four Indian seafarers and inj...

item.title: Houthis Declare Red Sea Oil Route Blockade, Threatening Global Trade
item.description: The Iran-aligned Houthis in Yemen have announced a naval blockade of the Red Sea oil route, escalating tensions between Iran and the US. This move threatens global energy supplies and trade, as the st...

item.title: Democrats Condemn Republican Budget Policies Amid Rising National Debt Concerns
item.description: During a House Rules Committee hearing, Democratic Rep. Jim McGovern sharply criticized Republican Rep. Jodey Arrington over a budget resolution that adds $4.7 trillion to the national debt without of...

item.title: Trump Threatens Tariffs on Canada Over Wildfire Smoke Impacting U.S. Air Quality
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump criticized Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney during the World Cup Final, accusing him of allowing wildfires to poison American air and demanding action. Trump claimed he ...

item.title: Senate Impeachment Court Subpoenas VP Sara Duterte's Financial Records Amid Legal Disputes
item.description: The third week of Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial commenced on July 20, 2026, with the Senate impeachment court granting the House prosecution's request to subpoena the financial recor...

item.title: Investigation into Jayden Adams' death continues as media faces criticism
item.description: Minister of Sport, Arts and Culture Gayton McKenzie has condemned media outlets for publishing speculative details about the death of footballer Jayden Adams, urging the public to allow police to inve...

item.title: Federal Judge Halts $110B Paramount Skydance-Warner Bros. Discovery Merger Over Antitrust Concerns
item.description: A federal judge temporarily blocked Paramount Skydance’s $110 billion merger with Warner Bros. Discovery, citing antitrust concerns raised by 12 Democratic state attorneys general. The lawsuit, filed ...

item.title: Advocating for the Use of Real Names Over Aliases in UK Race Baiting Discourse
item.description: The article argues against the use of aliases to refer to UK 'race baiters,' advocating for their real names to be used instead. It highlights the importance of accountability and transparency in poli...

item.title: Climate initiative aims to benefit 30,000 people in Kasulu region
item.description: A climate resilience project in Tanzania is targeting to improve livelihoods for over 30,000 residents in the Kasulu area. The initiative focuses on sustainable agricultural practices and climate adap...

item.title: Federal Judge Temporarily Blocks Paramount-Warner Bros. Merger Amid Legal Challenges
item.description: A federal judge has ordered Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery to halt their $81 billion merger for at least two weeks, granting states challenging the deal additional time to pursue their legal cas...

item.title: ASX declines as S&P 500 rises slightly; Iren jumps 20% on new contracts
item.description: Australian shares are expected to open lower, tracking weakness on the Dow as energy and tech stocks supported the S&P 500's opening gains. ASX 200 futures dipped 24 points to 8729, while the S&P 500 ...

item.title: FDA Apologizes for Mislinking Farm to Cyclospora Outbreak, Sparks Skepticism
item.description: Taylor Farms announced Monday that the FDA apologized for incorrectly linking its California-based farm to a cyclospora parasite outbreak that sickened over 1,645 people and hospitalized 141. The para...

item.title: Liam Gallagher Criticizes World Cup Halftime Show Performances
item.description: Liam Gallagher, the Oasis frontman, expressed his dissatisfaction with the halftime show during the FIFA World Cup final between Spain and Argentina on July 20, 2026. The performance featured a star-s...

item.title: Delhi Police Report Unruly Protesters During CJP Rally, Alleging Violence
item.description: The Delhi Police have labeled protesters during the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) rally as 'unruly, aggressive and violent,' claiming they disregarded lawful directions and caused chaos. The police repo...

item.title: House Panel Supports BIR Compliance with Senate Subpoena in Duterte Impeachment Case
item.description: The House prosecution panel expressed that there is no valid justification for President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. to block the Bureau of Internal Revenue (BIR) from adhering to a Senate impeachment court ...

item.title: Suspect in Ann Widdecombe's murder charged with murder
item.description: Joshua Kerry, a 28-year-old former lift company worker, has been charged with the murder of Ann Widdecombe, a prominent Reform UK spokeswoman and former MP. The attack occurred on 8 July at her remote...

item.title: NPA Seizes R326m in Assets Linked to Tembisa Hospital Corruption Scandal
item.description: The National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) has been granted court approval to auction off R326m in assets linked to Hangwani Maumela, a tenderpreneur accused of orchestrating a R2bn looting scheme at Te...

item.title: Labour Party Successfully Uploads Candidates' Details to INEC Portal
item.description: The Labour Party (LP) has confirmed it received the access code needed to upload candidates' details for the 2027 governorship and State House of Assembly elections. National Publicity Secretary Ken A...

item.title: Nigerian Man Becomes Registered Nurse in UK at 64 After Career Change
item.description: John Adesoye, a 64-year-old Nigerian, has become a registered nurse in the UK after switching careers from electronics, inspiring others with his message that age is no barrier to learning. Before his...
